div.p: Here is a little of law which must be fulfilled. The Levitical Priesthood is forever hereditary3—fixed on the head of Aaron and his sons forever,4 and was in active operation down to Zacharias5 the father of John. Zacharias would have had no child had not God given him a son. He sent his angel to declare unto Zacharias that his wife Elizabeth should bear him a son, whose name was to be called John.6
The keys of the Aaronic Priesthood were committed unto him, and he was as the voice of one crying in the wilderness saying: “Prepare ye the way of the Lord and make his paths straight.”7
The Kingdom of heaven suffereth violence,8 etc.
The kingdom of heaven continueth in authority until John.9
The authority taketh it by absolute power.10
John having the power took the Kingdom by authority.11
How have you obtained all this great knowledge? By the gift of the Holy Ghost.12
Wrested the Kingdom from the Jews.13
Of these stony Gentiles—these dogs—to raise up children unto Abraham.14

The Savior said unto John, I must be baptized by you. Why so? To fulfil all righteousness.15 John refuses at first, but afterwards obeyed by administering the ordinance of baptism unto him,16 Jesus having no other legal administrator to apply to.
There is no salvation between the two lids of the Bible without a legal administrator. Jesus was then the legal administrator, and ordained His Apostles.17—MSS. Historian’s Office.
div.div: The Prophet’s Remarks at the Funeral of Judge Higbee
div.p: Brethren and Sisters, you will find these words in 2 Peter 3:10, 11:—“But the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in the which the heavens shall pass away with a great noise, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat, the earth also and the works that are therein shall be burned up.
